title: discopt: a hybrid MINLP solver combining Rust, JAX, and Python
description: discopt is a hybrid Mixed-Integer Nonlinear Programming (MINLP) solver combining a Rust backend (LP solving, branch-and-bound tree management), JAX (automatic differentiation, NLP relaxations, GPU acceleration), and Python orchestration. It supports spatial branch-and-bound, McCormick relaxations, neural-network embedding, generalized disjunctive programming, and multiple NLP backends (pure-JAX IPM, ripopt, cyipopt).
